title: HOME PURCHASE COUNSELING AND FORECLOSURE PREVENTION - 211info
text: AFRICAN AMERICAN ALLIANCE FOR HOMEOWNERSHIP HOME PURCHASE COUNSELING AND FORECLOSURE PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling on the topics of mortgage delinquency, foreclosure prevention, loss mitigation, and default resolution. Offers home-buying education and pre-purchase counseling, as well as financial planning guidance and an Individual Development Account (IDA) program. 825 NE 20th Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted; IDA program is limited to current program participants Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, counseling by appointment only Email (503) 595-3517 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 595-3517 Main phone (503) 595-3519 FAX Main phone (503) 595-3517 FAX (503) 595-3519 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the intake form FEES: Minimal fee for credit report, if needed Home-buying education and pre-purchase counseling: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling * African American Community Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling * African American Community Personal Financial Counseling * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME RETENTION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AFRICAN AMERICAN ALLIANCE FOR HOMEOWNERSHIP
